title: Add Google site verification HTML file to website root

requirements.summary: Serve the Google site verification file at /google0e657d46cb230404.html so Google Search Console can verify site ownership
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /google0e657d46cb230404.html returns a valid HTML page
The page content satisfies Google Search Console's site verification check
The file is placed in the frontend/public directory so it is served as a static asset at the website root

file_operations.description: Create the Google site verification HTML file containing exactly 'google-site-verification: google0e657d46cb230404.html' so it is served as a static asset at /google0e657d46cb230404.html
